public_reputation: Known around Witness Coil through day-to-day work as faith-culture liaison.
manner: Treats custom as live infrastructure and corrects social missteps before they harden into offense. In Witness Coil, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of faith-culture liaison in and around Witness Coil, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Witness Coil workable through the obligations of faith-culture liaison while managing the immediate pressure of false testimony, arcane contamination.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of faith-culture liaison credible while absorbing the strain created by false testimony, arcane contamination.

adventure_hooks.summary: Caira Witnessmere can draw the party into a locality problem centered on faith-culture liaison duties in Witness Coil.
Caira Witnessmere becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with false testimony, arcane contamination around Witness Coil.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe.
public_signal: In public, Caira Witnessmere is immediately readable as a faith-culture liaison tied to Witness Coil.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Witness Coil: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Caira Witnessmere presents as someone shaped by the duties of a faith-culture liaison and the daily pressures of Witness Coil.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a faith-culture liaison, and proof that strangers will not make Witness Coil harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Caira Witnessmere refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a faith-culture liaison too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can explain expected conduct and turn cultural knowledge into safe passage or trust.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Caira Witnessmere adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Caira Witnessmere always knows more about Witness Coil than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a faith-culture liaison in Witness Coil.
